ifeval.prompt: Write two jokes about rockets. Do not contain commas in your response. Separate the two jokes with 6 asterisk symbols: ******.

models.answer:
Why did the rocket go to therapy  
It had deep space issues  

******

I asked a rocket if it liked space travel  
It said it was tired of being launched into trouble

Why did the rocket go to school? To study propulsion systems
****** 
A rocket jumped off the ground and landed in a library it was looking for a quiet place to rest

Why did the rocket bring a ladder? To reach the top of the rocket  
What do you call a rocket that can fly in a puddle? A floating rocket  
******

Why don't rockets ever get lost? Because they always know where they are going.
******
What do you call a rocket that can't fly? A rocket that's just waiting for a better launchpad.
Why did the rocket break up with the moon because it felt too distant ******. What do you call a rocket that is feeling down a rocket ship

Joke 1
Why did the rocket blush
Because it saw the Earth

1. Why don't rockets fly over the clouds? Because they're too big to fly.
2. What do you call a rocket that drops a ball? A skydive.
